# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - deploy

deploy_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying with merge request title: $CI_COMMIT_TITLE"
    - echo "Deploying with merge request description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
  only:
    - main
  environment:
    name: production
    url: http://example.com
  tags:
    - deploy-with-mr-title-$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID
